subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! How can I make mention of Thee when I find no respite from the successive downpours of Thy trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی کیف اذکرک بعد الذی لم اجد الفرصه من توالی امطار بلائک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
